categories.name: Epistemic Storage
categories.description: Confidence, provenance, and temporal decay as first-class storage primitives

features.name: Confidence Envelopes
features.tagline: Every value carries confidence metadata maintained by the engine, not computed at read time

features.name: Temporal Decay (TDQP)
features.tagline: Belief confidence automatically decays as a function of time without application intervention

features.name: Confidence-Aware Buffer Merge
features.tagline: B-epsilon flush applies temporal decay and confidence inheritance, not just data compaction

features.name: Provenance Chains
features.tagline: Every entity carries a full history of who/what/when, queryable without joins

features.name: Storage-Native Belief Revision
features.tagline: Bayesian belief updates happen at the storage layer, not in application code

features.name: Retrieval-Reinforced Memory
features.tagline: Frequently accessed knowledge strengthens; unused knowledge decays naturally

categories.name: Security & Governance
categories.description: Cryptographic access control, governance-bound encryption, and post-quantum readiness

features.name: CBAC (6-State Circuit Breaker)
features.tagline: Governance state machine with CAS semantics controlling all data access transitions

features.name: RDKC (Governance-Bound Keys)
features.tagline: Per-page encryption keys derived from governance state — unauthorized decryption is mathematically impossible

features.name: REWG (Graph-Derived Entitlements)
features.tagline: Access rights derived from graph position via bitwise AND inheritance, not ACL tables

features.name: EACB (FROST Threshold Signatures)
features.tagline: N-of-M human-in-the-loop authorization for autonomous operations using distributed key shares

features.name: Post-Quantum Key Transport
features.tagline: ML-KEM-1024 + X25519 hybrid key encapsulation aligned with CNSA 2.0

categories.name: Cross-Modal Query
categories.description: KV, graph, spatial, and full-text search in a single engine with zero serialization

features.name: Cross-Modal Query Engine
features.tagline: Span KV, graph, GIS, and search in a single query — 182µs vs 15-60ms for a 3-system stack

features.name: Full-Text Search (CWBM25)
features.tagline: Confidence-weighted BM25 ranking with field tokenization, inline with the storage engine

features.name: GeoHash3D Spatial Indexing
features.tagline: 3D geospatial hashing at 35ns encode, jurisdiction lookups at 1.63µs for 100 points

features.name: First-Class Graph Edges
features.tagline: 11 canonical edge types with typed filtering at 47,600 edges/sec creation throughput

features.name: Depth-Bounded Retrieval (DBRG)
features.tagline: Graph traversal with configurable depth limits and confidence floor pruning

categories.name: Storage Engine
categories.description: B-epsilon tree core with write-ahead logging, MVCC transactions, and copy-on-write semantics

features.name: B-Epsilon Tree
features.tagline: Write-optimized tree structure with adaptive epsilon tuning and sorted BTreeMap buffers

features.name: WAL + Group Commit
features.tagline: Write-ahead logging with batched commits for 8-10x throughput improvement

features.name: CoW MVCC Transactions
features.tagline: Copy-on-write snapshots with Serializable Snapshot Isolation — readers never block writers

features.name: GEMVT Zone Map Pruning
features.tagline: Governance-embedded version tokens with zone maps for subtree skipping during filtered queries

categories.name: Federation & Sync
categories.description: Multi-device mesh with clearance-enforced synchronization and offline operation

features.name: FWGA (5-Tier Mesh)
features.tagline: Federated world graph with 5 device tiers, clearance-aware sync, and quorum-as-confidence

features.name: OCSS (Offline Confidence Stamping)
features.tagline: Disconnected operation with 4-phase sync protocol and confidence-aware conflict resolution

features.name: Conflict Resolution Pipeline
features.tagline: 4-way classification with conflict queue, snapshot archival, and clearance-enforced resolution

categories.name: Efficiency & Hardware
categories.description: Platform-aware optimizations for power, memory, and computational efficiency

features.name: Apple Silicon QoS
features.tagline: E-core pinning via pthread QoS achieves 9.1x lower power than SQLite on Apple Silicon

features.name: DynamicValue Codec
features.tagline: Format-tagged encoding (Bincode/JSON) with 3.3% overhead and 49x cheaper governance than app-layer

features.name: Adaptive Epsilon Tuning
features.tagline: Runtime B-epsilon parameter adjustment balancing write amplification against read latency
